answer:
<think> I know that Hozier is an Irish singer-songwriter, and I'm familiar with his music. I recall that one of his popular songs is "Take Me to Church", which reached a high chart position in Ireland. I also know that Hozier's self-titled debut album was released in 2014, and it includes the song "Take Me to Church". I'm going to assume that the album I'm thinking of is his debut album, as it's his most well-known work. I'll look up the release date of that album to determine when it was released globally. According to my knowledge, Hozier's self-titled debut album was released on September 19, 2014. Therefore, the album containing the song that reached #2 on the Irish Singles Chart was released globally in 2014. </think>
<answer> 2014 </answer>
